education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering

education.institution: Tohoku University STEM Summer Program, Sendai, Japan

research_experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant (Embedded Systems)
research_experience.company: Sensors, Energy, and Automation Laboratory (SEAL), Seattle, WA
bullets: Assisting the Body Sensor Team to develop a PPG Sleepiness Detection system using machine learning algorithms to classify fatigue levels from heart biometrics in safety-critical environments.

work_experience.title: Electrical Systems Engineer
work_experience.company: Engineering Horizons at UW, Seattle, WA
bullets: Designing, assembling, and validating electrical power and control systems for a Mars Rover prototype.

work_experience.title: Lead (Drone Hardware Engineer)
work_experience.company: Husky Robotics Drone Subteam, Seattle, WA
bullets: Spearhead recruitment and technical onboarding for 20+ members; manage the full development lifecycle of three custom PCBs (Flight Controller, ESC, PDB), BOM selection, and Professional Design Reviews.
Piloted the design of a custom PCB (STM32H743, Altium) featuring DSHOT600, redundant power sensing, and telemetry broadcasting; achieved full compatibility with PX4 firmware standards.
Architected a companion computer system using Jetson Orin Nano and Pixhawk 6C via MAVLink over a redundant 5GHz bridge to enable computer vision and autonomous navigation.
Implemented serial protocols (UART, I2C, SPI, CAN) to interface external peripherals, bridging hardware sensors with firmware logic for real-time state estimation.
Developed an automated thrust stand using Arduino with hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) test fixtures to characterize motor performance using oscilloscopes, optimizing propulsion power efficiency by 25%.

work_experience.title: Drone Hardware Engineer
work_experience.company: Husky Robotics Drone Subteam, Seattle, WA
bullets: Spearhead recruitment and technical onboarding for 20+ members; manage the full development lifecycle of three custom PCBs (Flight Controller, ESC, PDB), BOM selection, and Professional Design Reviews.

work_experience.title: Autonomous Systems Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed autonomous flight and landing systems for the ARIDGE X3 flying car.

projects.name: Flight Controller PCB Design (Husky Robotics)
projects.description: Designed a custom PCB featuring STM32H743 microcontroller, DSHOT600 protocol, redundant power sensing, and telemetry broadcasting for a drone flight controller, achieving compatibility with PX4 firmware standards.

projects.name: Automated Thrust Stand (Husky Robotics)
projects.description: Developed an automated thrust stand using Arduino (HIL) to test and characterize motor performance, optimizing propulsion power efficiency by 25%.

projects.name: Mars Rover Electrical Systems (Engineering Horizons)
projects.description: Designed, assembled, and validated electrical power and control systems for a Mars Rover prototype.
